'''vazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neckward|neckward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neckward|neckward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vazhate|vazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vazhatesher|vazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazhatesherĂ«m|vazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazhatero|vazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vazhateshĂ«|vazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazhateshĂ«m|vazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazhatero|gokivazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivazhateshĂ«|gokivazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazhateshĂ«m|gokivazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govazhankerom|govazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govazhankeshĂ«|govazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govazhankeshĂ«m|govazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govazhankeya|govazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazhaterom|vazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazhatemu|vazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vazhateya|vazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazhaterom|gokivazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazhatemu|gokivazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivazhateya|gokivazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vazhazhate|vazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vazhazhatesher|vazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazhazhatesherĂ«m|vazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazhazhatero|vazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vazhazhateshĂ«|vazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazhazhateshĂ«m|vazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazhazhatero|gokivazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivazhazhateshĂ«|gokivazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazhazhateshĂ«m|gokivazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govazhazhankerom|govazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govazhazhankeshĂ«|govazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govazhazhankeshĂ«m|govazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govazhazhankeya|govazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazhazhaterom|vazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazhazhatemu|vazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vazhazhateya|vazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazhazhaterom|gokivazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazhazhatemu|gokivazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivazhazhateya|gokivazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠte|vĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠtesher|vĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠtero|vĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokivĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|govĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|govĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠterom|vĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠtemu|vĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠzhĂŠteya|vĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokivĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokivĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafzhafte|vafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafzhaftesher|vafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafzhaftesherĂ«m|vafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafzhaftero|vafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafzhafteshĂ«|vafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafzhafteshĂ«m|vafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafzhaftero|gokivafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafzhafteshĂ«|gokivafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafzhafteshĂ«m|gokivafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafzhafnkerom|govafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafzhafnkeshĂ«|govafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafzhafnkeshĂ«m|govafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafzhafnkeya|govafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafzhafterom|vafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafzhaftemu|vafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafzhafteya|vafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafzhafterom|gokivafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafzhaftemu|gokivafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafzhafteya|gokivafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
